title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is finally beginning,
and the crowd is buzzing in anticipation of the
so-called "princess showdown" between Fine
Motion and Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among that crowd stands Air Shakur. Apparently,
she's here to ascertain something or other. Her
expression is grim as she watches Fine Motion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is beyond excited as the dream
match approaches! Though she's vexed by her
newfound competitive spirit, she promises to race
with all she has.
